title: Skopeo copy from docker-machine to remote registry
body:
Hello
Is there a way to copy an image from local repository where a docker-machine is running not docker daemon to a remote registry?

I would think, **_docker-daemon_** is not a option here.

```
% docker-machine status
Running
% docker images
REPOSITORY     TAG       IMAGE ID             CREATED      SIZE
client-tools         test      8914b7084822   2 days ago    1.4GB
% skopeo copy docker-machine://client-tools:test docker://<remote-registry>/client-tools:test
```

comments.body:
Thanks for your report.

I’m not immediately sure what `docker-machine` does.

For an initial pointer, see the `--src-daemon-host` and `--dest-daemon-host` options; that might be sufficient (comparable to the `DOCKER_HOST` environment variable), or not.

I suspect you will find this useful: https://github.com/containers/skopeo/issues/557#issuecomment-1054533509
In short I did have success using DOCKER_HOST and DOCKER_CERT_PATH for Minikube, which I suspect is similar to how docker-machine works in this particular context.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Assuming that `--*-daemon-host` worked, please reopen if that’s not the case.
